# BP-132 variant negative: the id-based ExecContext checks the affected count.
lang: go
file: BP-132-variant-safe.go
variant: database-sql-id-update-checked
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

func renameUser(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, id int) error {
	// index-backed
	result, err := db.ExecContext(ctx, "UPDATE users SET display_name = ? WHERE id = ?", "Ada", id)
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("update: %w", err)
	}
	rows, err := result.RowsAffected()
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("rows affected: %w", err)
	}
	if rows != 1 {
		return sql.ErrNoRows
	}
	return nil
}
